volume_readout: What volume does the graduated cylinder show?
Read the meniscus against the tick marks. What integer volume is shown?
Using the mL scale, what is the liquid volume in the cylinder?
What is the cylinder's liquid volume in mL?
Read the shown graduated-cylinder level. What integer mL value is indicated?
displacement_volume: What volume is displaced, using the before and after cylinder readings?
Subtract the before reading from the after reading. What displaced volume is shown?
Using the two mL scales, what is the volume increase after the object is added?
What integer mL displacement is shown by the before/after cylinder pair?
Read both meniscus levels and compute the displaced volume in mL.

scene:graduated_cylinder_diagram.object_description: a graduated-cylinder setup with visible liquid meniscus lines, tick marks, numeric scale labels, and mL units

query:volume_readout.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the graduated-cylinder readout, including the liquid level, tick marks, numeric scale labels, and mL unit
query:volume_readout.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer liquid volume in mL

query:displacement_volume.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping before_cylinder and after_cylinder to [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the corresponding graduated-cylinder readouts, including liquid levels, tick marks, numeric scale labels, and mL units
query:displacement_volume.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer displaced volume in mL
